message:
test(action-timeline): add 44 unit tests with edge cases (bd-11ck.3)

Add comprehensive unit tests for ActionTimeline:
- Enum labels and coverage tests (Severity, Component, EventKind)
- Initialization tests (event count, IDs, defaults)
- Buffer invariant tests (max capacity, eviction)
- Filter cycling tests (component, severity, kind, clear)
- Filter application tests (single and combined)
- Navigation tests (up/down, vim keys, page, home/end)
- Toggle tests (follow mode, details)
- Selection bounds tests (empty, clamp, scroll)
- Tick tests (event generation)
- Synthetic event tests (determinism, fields, evidence)
- Screen trait tests (title, keybindings)
- Resize event tests
- Edge case tests (empty filters, rapid navigation)

Also fixes:
- IntrinsicSizing: spacing() -> gap() method name
- IntrinsicSizing: add to keybindings/accent match arms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,6 +41,8 @@ SCREENS:
    14  Responsive         Breakpoint-driven responsive layout demo
    15  Log Search         Live log search and filter demo
    16  Notifications      Toast notification system demo
+   17  Action Timeline    Event timeline with filtering and severity
+   18  Sizing             Content-aware intrinsic sizing demo
 
 KEYBINDINGS:
     1-9, 0          Switch to screens 1-10 by number
